no: NOT a WeiDU mod — manual file copy only. Cannot be automated. Remove .

in.t: Not a WeiDU mod — manual file copy only. Cannot be installed by automated tools.

sum: Fixes Sarevok's Deathbringer Assault ability in Throne of Bhaal, correcting damage application to lower-level creatures, laugh timing, and adding feedback when he stuns enemies.

co.no: Fixes the Deathbringer ability to work correctly.
